# Sandy Chaos

Sandy Chaos is a research and implementation repo focused on Tempo Tracer, causality-preserving communication ideas, nested temporal domains, observer-coupling, and continuity architecture.

## Preferred entrypoints
- Docs index: /docs/README.md
- Foundations: /docs/01_foundations.md
- Tempo Tracer Protocol: /docs/02_tempo_tracer_protocol.md
- Micro-Observer & Agency: /docs/03_micro_observer_agency.md
- Neuro Roadmap: /docs/04_neuro_roadmap.md
- Nested Temporal Domains: /docs/13_nested_temporal_domains.md
- Cognitive Tempo Orchestration: /docs/14_cognitive_tempo_orchestration.md
- Endosymbiosis and Host Assimilation: /docs/17_endosymbiosis_and_host_assimilation.md
- Adaptive Substrate and Host Binding: /docs/18_adaptive_substrate_and_host_binding.md
- Surface Authority Architecture: /docs/19_surface_authority_architecture.md
- Glossary: /docs/glossary.md

## Scope discipline
Treat claims using the repo's own tiers:
- Defensible now
- Plausible but unproven
- Speculative

Prefer canonical docs over archive drafts when both exist.
Preserve causal-boundary discipline and do not flatten speculative material into established mechanism.
